results.name: supplier sees only their own rows (supplierId=me)
supplierUser also gets supplier scope
auditor uses auditorField when provided
buyer is not scoped (sees full tenant)
tenant_admin is not scoped (sees full tenant)
PLATFORM admin scope wins over role
unknown persona is denied (impossible filter set)
missing supplierField for supplier persona = no scope
buyer invites → new user gets buyer role
supplier invites → new user gets supplierUser role
auditor invites → new user gets auditor role
tenant_admin invites → defaults to buyer
unknown role falls back to buyer
auditor edit with empty responseDetails keeps supplier's answer
auditor edit with no responseDetails field keeps existing
supplier edit overwrites their own responseDetails
supplier edit with undefined falls back to existing then {}
with flagged questions: bounces to supplier as followup_requested
without flagged questions: marks review_completed (not sent_to_supplier)
review_completed must NOT be sent_to_supplier (regression guard)
buyer with tenant gets OR-scoped (tenant OR personal)
buyer without tenant falls back to personal only
buyer can NOT be limited to create_by_buyer_id alone (regression)
superadmin sees everything ({})
hides follow-up milestones when status is sent_to_supplier
keeps follow-up milestones once questionnaireStatus contains 'followup'
keeps follow-up milestone if its instance is past NOT_STARTED
substitutes [Date]
substitutes [Vendor/Supplier Company Name]
substitutes [Name of Product/API/Excipient]
substitutes [Vendor Code/Agreement Number, if applicable]
substitutes [Facility Address] vs [Address] separately
computes [End Date] from [Start Date] + [Number] days
substitutes [Number] for duration
regression: no literal '[Date]' or '[Vendor' tokens left
falls back to today when no auditDate provided
returns true when supplierIntimationAcceptedAt is set (new field)
returns true when trackStatus is 'Intimation acknowledged' (new value)
returns true for legacy 'Supplier accepted intimation'
returns true for actual ACCEPTED decision
returns false for empty audit (regression guard)
returns false when only generic 'accepted' track text (no longer sufficient alone)
DEVIATION_REPORTED → warning
PQ_REQUESTED → warning
CHANGE_CONTROL_OPENED → warning
AUDIT_REPORT_DRAFTED → info (no warning verb)
PQ_DECISION → info
AUDIT_REPORT_REJECTED → critical (hypothetical)
actionUrl is merged into payload when present
payload is unchanged when actionUrl is null
payload is unchanged when actionUrl is undefined
SUPPLIER_MARKETPLACE includes BUYER and TENANT_ADMIN
PRODUCT_CATALOG includes BUYER and TENANT_ADMIN
REQUEST_AUDITS includes BUYER and TENANT_ADMIN
AUDITOR_NETWORK includes BUYER and TENANT_ADMIN
MY_WORKSPACE supplier menu group has all 10 expected items
NotificationBell no longer wraps panel in DetailsPanel

audit table imports both supplier accept/reject helpers
table renders showSupplierAcceptReject branch with handlers
buyer assign-auditor button no longer requires supplierDecision==='ACCEPTED'
